channel.title: POCO F6 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

image.title: POCO F6 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.WNPIDXM Fastboot update for POCO F6 Indonesia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: POCO F6 Indonesia

Codename: peridot

Version: OS3.0.3.0.WNPIDXM | 16.0

Size: 8.7 GB

MD5: c55793c2a8c29a2c24fe9b833b8dfff8

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to January 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
